\tzpentry{ID5806}{Kaluza-Klein Pi Bound}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5806 introduces Kaluza-Klein Pi Bound as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} |l - l'| \leq 2, \quad m + m' + m_{KK} \equiv 0 \pmod{2\pi R_{KK}/\lambda_{dB}} \end{equation}
